title: Run
description: Workflow run lifecycle objects – covers run creation input, node-level I/O, and the final run result. These payloads are exchanged between the Java service layer and the Python Temporal worker during execution.

RunInput.title: RunInput
RunInput.description: Payload sent from the Java control plane to start a new workflow run.

agent_version_id.description: Reference to the AgentVersion to execute.

input.description: Initial input payload for the workflow.

NodeInput.title: NodeInput
NodeInput.description: Input payload passed to a single node execution activity.

run_id.description: The workflow run this node belongs to.

state.description: Accumulated workflow state from previous node executions.

NodeOutput.title: NodeOutput
NodeOutput.description: Output produced by a single node execution activity. Returned to the Temporal workflow to drive control flow.

run_id.description: The workflow run this output belongs to.

node_id.description: The node id that produced this output.

result.description: Node execution result. Type depends on node type.

state.description: Updated workflow state after this node's execution.

next_node_id.description: Override the next node id. Used by router nodes for conditional branching. Null means follow the default edge.

error.description: Error message if the node execution failed. Null means success.

RunStatus.title: RunStatus
RunStatus.description: Terminal status of a workflow run.

RunResult.title: RunResult
RunResult.description: Final result returned by the Temporal workflow upon completion.

error.description: Error message if the run failed. Null means success.
